summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification using the provided preflight artifact as live state. No GitHub mutations are planned. Security-sensitive refs are routed item-by-item; already-closed refs are kept closed; open non-security PRs are kept related based on unresolved maintainer/review/proof blockers.

actions.reason: Security-sensitive item per preflight; quarantine this PR without close, merge, label, comment, or fix planning.
Distinct Slack behavior change with proof and conflict blockers; no close-style action is justified in plan mode.
Open non-security PR with useful focused code but unresolved proof/review blockers; classify without closure.
Security-sensitive gateway/auth-adjacent item per preflight; quarantine this PR without other action.
Broad, mixed-scope availability/session-state PR with proof blocker; keep related for maintainer follow-up rather than closing as duplicate.
Already closed; no further action in plan mode.
Focused feature PR with unresolved review/author/conflict state; keep related rather than close or merge.
Open feature PR with supplied proof but broad auth-provider/session-state surface; keep related for maintainer review.
Already closed after fixed-on-main determination; no further action in plan mode.
Already closed; security-sensitive historical context remains quarantined and receives no mutation.
